title: Rerender plus doctor before widening shared-root component drift into rollout work

window_scope.notes: Use only after the owner refresh route, reviewed followthrough decision, and derived component refresh summary all point at the same bounded refresh move.

lesson_summary: When shared-root Codex plane drift repeats a rerender-plus-doctor recovery path, keep the pattern as optional memo support only after the owner route, reviewed followthrough decision, and derived summary agree on the same bounded refresh move.
recall_posture: Use as bounded recall only after checking the owner refresh route, reviewed followthrough decision, owner law, and derived component refresh summary.
notes: Memo keeps the component-refresh recovery pattern subordinate to the owner refresh route, reviewed followthrough decision, owner laws, and derived summary. It must not become the first record of refresh truth or scheduler authority.
